title: Send a coding prompt and receive a streamed agent response
description: This verifies that a user can send a coding-related prompt and see the assistant response stream through to completion.

steps.description: Type a coding-related prompt into the agent composer
Verify the user message appears in the conversation timeline
Verify a streamed assistant response appears and the run completes

title: Choose a workspace and enter the main shell
description: This verifies that a first-run user can complete onboarding by selecting a workspace and reaching the main application shell.

steps.description: Verify the main application shell is displayed

title: Save Groq provider settings and discover models
description: This verifies that a user can enter a Groq API key, discover available models, and set Groq as the active provider for agent use.

steps.description: Paste the Groq API key into the provider key field
Select Groq as the active provider
Verify a populated Groq model list is displayed
Verify the active provider is set to Groq

title: Create a new chat session
description: This verifies that a user can open the Sessions panel and create a new session that becomes active.

steps.description: Verify a new session is displayed as the active session

title: Switch to another chat session
description: This verifies that a user can switch between existing sessions and see the conversation context update.

steps.description: Verify the conversation updates to the selected session

title: Open settings and discover Groq models
description: This verifies that a user can open Settings, add provider credentials, and discover models for the active provider.

steps.description: Fill in the Groq API key field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify the provider is shown as active

title: Choose a Groq model in the agent panel
description: This verifies that selecting a Groq model in the agent model picker updates the active model used by the composer.

steps.description: Open the model picker in the Agent panel
Verify the active model label updates
Verify the selected model is shown as active in the Agent panel

title: Delete a chat session
description: This verifies that a user can delete a session from its context menu and see it removed from the list.

steps.description: Verify the session is removed from the list

title: Rename a chat session
description: This verifies that a user can rename a session from its context menu and see the updated name in the list.

steps.description: Verify the session list shows the updated session name

title: Choose a local llama.cpp model and see its status
description: This verifies that selecting a local llama.cpp model updates the model badge state in the Agent panel.

steps.description: Open the model picker in the Agent panel
Verify a loading, loaded, or error status is displayed for the selected model

title: Switch to Ask mode and receive a direct assistant answer
description: This verifies that Ask mode returns a streamed assistant answer without requiring a review step.

steps.description: Type a prompt into the agent composer
Switch the composer to Ask mode
Verify a streamed assistant answer appears
Verify no review step is shown

title: View the current session after provider configuration persists
description: This verifies that after provider setup, the user returns to the same session context with model selection available for chatting.

steps.description: Fill in the Groq API key field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify the current session remains selected
Verify model selection is available for the active session

title: Stop a long-running agent response
description: This verifies that a user can stop an in-progress agent run and that streaming halts.

steps.description: Type a prompt that starts a long-running agent response into the agent composer
Verify the run is no longer active

title: Configure a local llama.cpp model and continue chatting
description: This verifies that a user can select a local llama.cpp model, see its status update, and return to chat in the active session.

steps.description: Verify the selected model status is displayed
Verify the active session conversation remains available

title: Reject an invalid Groq key without enabling models
description: This verifies that entering an invalid Groq API key does not produce a usable Groq model list.

steps.description: Paste an invalid Groq API key into the provider key field
Verify no usable model list update is shown
Verify a validation or warning state is visible
